title: Dataset Documenter Badge Example
subtitle: Tabular example with full documentation for usability rating 10.
description:
## Overview
This is a minimal, fully documented dataset created to earn the **Dataset Documenter** badge (perfect usability rating of 10).

## Contents
- **sample_data.csv**: Small table with three columns (id, value, label).

## Usage
Suitable for testing pipelines, tutorials, or as a template for documenting your own datasets. Load with pandas: `pd.read_csv('sample_data.csv')`.

## Provenance
Synthetic data generated for Kaggle badge documentation. No real-world source.

resources.description: Main data file: 5 rows, 3 columns. CSV format, UTF-8 encoded. Contains integer id, decimal value, and categorical label.

fields.name: id
fields.title: Row identifier; unique integer from 1 to 5.

fields.name: value
fields.title: Numeric value; example decimal values for demonstration.

fields.name: label
fields.title: Category label; either A or B.
